verses.text: Give unto the \+w LORD\+w*, O ye mighty, give unto the \+w LORD\+w* glory and strength.
Give unto the \+w LORD\+w* the glory due unto his name; worship the \+w LORD\+w* in the beauty of holiness.
The voice of the \+w LORD\+w* is upon the waters: the God of glory thundereth: the \+w LORD\+w* is upon many waters.
The voice of the \+w LORD\+w* is powerful; the voice of the \+w LORD\+w* is full of majesty.
The voice of the \+w LORD\+w* breaketh the cedars; yea, the \+w LORD\+w* breaketh the cedars of Lebanon.
He maketh them also to skip like a calf; Lebanon and Sirion like a young unicorn.
The voice of the \+w LORD\+w* divideth the flames of fire.
The voice of the \+w LORD\+w* shaketh the wilderness; the \+w LORD\+w* shaketh the wilderness of Kadesh.
The voice of the \+w LORD\+w* maketh the hinds to calve, and discovereth the forests: and in his temple doth every one speak of his glory.
The \+w LORD\+w* sitteth upon the flood; yea, the \+w LORD\+w* sitteth King for ever.
The \+w LORD\+w* will give strength unto his people; the \+w LORD\+w* will bless his people with peace.
